author.description: Retired Border Patrol Commander-at-Large. Spent 30 years doing the job politicians only campaign on. Now calling out their failures and offering real solutions.

tweets.text:
Watch this and tell me these aren’t the finest frontline operators America has. Border Patrol on horseback, cutting through the desert like Ghost Riders in the Sky, running down a suspected cartel member and netting 13 illegal aliens in one clean, high-speed operation. Precision. Discipline. Relentless execution. The Mean Green Team isn’t just holding the line — they’re dominating it with pure competence and courage.

This is merely the tip of what the Mean Green Team is capable of.

Why keep this level of talent and tactical excellence chained to the border when we have a massive interior problem that demands the same skill set? These agents already know how to track, pursue, and apprehend — day or night, on horseback, ATV, or foot. Give them the mission and the backing to conduct mass deportations inside the country and they’ll deliver the results Americans voted for: restored rule of law, dismantled criminal networks, and a nation that actually controls who stays here.

No more half-measures. This team has the high-agency mindset and proven capability to finish the job from the border all the way inland. Let’s unleash them. #mass deportations#massdeportations
tweets.text_resolved:

This is merely the tip of what the Mean Green Team is capable of.

Why keep this level of talent and tactical excellence chained to the border when we have a massive interior problem that demands the same skill set? These agents already know how to track, pursue, and apprehend — day or night, on horseback, ATV, or foot. Give them the mission and the backing to conduct mass deportations inside the country and they’ll deliver the results Americans voted for: restored rule of law, dismantled criminal networks, and a nation that actually controls who stays here.

No more half-measures. This team has the high-agency mindset and proven capability to finish the job from the border all the way inland. Let’s unleash them. #mass deportations#massdeportations
